svg.title: Counting sort — clean step-by-step diagram
svg.desc: Three phases shown sequentially with simple down-arrows between consecutive states only. No crossing arrows.

g.text: Phase 1 — for each element, increment count[value]

svg.text: Count[ ] after prefix sum (= last position of each value in output)
count[2]=3 — last 2 goes to output[2] · count[3]=5 — last 3 goes to output[4]

g.text: Phase 3 — traverse input right→left, place at count[v]−1, decrement count[v]
Output: [1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 4, 8] · Time O(n+k) · Space O(k) where k = 8
